steps.title: Use the praise clue
steps.content: Critics praised Ortiz for creatively transforming a museum rotunda with projection and sound. The blank needs a positive word for originality and creative thinking, not a word suggesting restraint or confusion.

steps.title: Match the word to creativity
steps.content:
• Choice A: Means limited or held back, which conflicts with the dynamic installation.
  • Choice B: Means original and creative, matching the praise.
  • Choice C: Means impossible to explain, which does not fit the clear praise.
  • Choice D: Means baffling, not creatively effective.
The answer is B.
